title: Man arrested for driving under the influence in Bay View
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Da Gamaskop Police arrested a 25-year-old man in connection with a case of drunken driving in Hannes Pienaar Street, Bay View, Hartenbos, at 20:30 on Friday 3 October.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Da Gamaskop Police arrested a 25-year-old man in connection with a case of drunken driving in Hannes Pienaar Street, Bay View, Hartenbos, at 20:30 on Friday 3 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"A police spokesperson, Lieutenant Colonel Malcolm Pojie, said the officers had initially responded to an accident on Louis Fourie Road that evening, but upon their arrival, there was no vehicle."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"However, they saw some evidence of an incident from some markings on the scene.","html":"However, they saw some evidence of an incident from some markings on the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While there, they received a tip-off that the vehicle was in Hannes Pienaar Street. They proceeded there and found the man in the vehicle.","html":"While there, they received a tip-off that the vehicle was in Hannes Pienaar Street. They proceeded there and found the man in the vehicle."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pojie said a breathalyser test was conducted on the man and when he failed, he was arrested.","html":"Pojie said a breathalyser test was conducted on the man and when he failed, he was arrested."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pojie said he will be summoned to appear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court once he has been charged.","html":"Pojie said he will be summoned to appear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court once he has been charged."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Man arrested for driving under the influence in Bay View
